title: orlaya maritima
intro: Orlaya maritima, also known as sea holly or sea parsley, is a plant species in the carrot family that grows in the coastal regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Orlaya maritima include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Orlaya maritima can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its expectorant and diuretic properties.
